title: Datadog pops 39% in Nasdaq debut as cloud software IPOs stay hot
text: Datadog IPO Debut and Market Performance. IPO Details: Datadog went public on September 19 2019 raising over 640 million through an initial public offering that valued the company at 10.7 billion. More specifically Datadog priced its stock at 27 selling 24 million shares. First Day Trading: The stock climbed to 40.50 on its first day up from the 27 IPO price valuing the company at 10.9 billion. Market Significance: After Datadog's first-day pop the provider of analytics and monitoring tools became the fourth cloud software company to go public in 2019 and attain a market cap of at least 10 billion. Financial Metrics: In the first six months of 2019 Datadog's revenue jumped 79 percent to 153.4 million. Datadog's revenue increased 82 percent to 83 million in the quarter that ended in June. The company recorded a net loss of 13.4 million in the first half of the year as research and development costs doubled. Customer Metrics: Datadog recorded retention in its latest quarter of 151 percent indicating strong customer expansion.
